ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organs" (
  "organ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipe organ */,
  "builder" TEXT /* Name of the organ builder */,
  "opus_number" TEXT /* Opus number of the organ */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the organ was constructed */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the organ is located */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size description of the organ (e.g., number of manuals and ranks) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organ */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the organ */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the organ (e.g., Baroque, Romantic) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the organ (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  "installation_year" INTEGER /* Year the organ was installed in the current location */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the organ */,
  "last_inspection_report" TEXT /* Summary of the last inspection report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organs_builder FOREIGN KEY ("builder") REFERENCES builders ("builder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builders" (
  "builder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each builder */,
  "builder_name" TEXT /* Name of the organ builder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the builder */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the builder was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the builder (city, state, country) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the builder */,
  "number_of_organs" INTEGER /* Total number of organs built by the builder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("builder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "organ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organ the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., photograph, blueprint, document) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or description of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_organ_id FOREIGN KEY ("organ_id") REFERENCES organs ("organ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restorations" (
  "restoration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restoration project */,
  "organ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organ undergoing restoration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the restoration project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the restoration project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the restoration project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restoration project */,
  "restoration_cost" TEXT /* Estimated or actual cost of the restoration */,
  "restoration_team" TEXT /* Names or IDs of the team members involved in the restoration */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the restoration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restoration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restorations_organ_id FOREIGN KEY ("organ_id") REFERENCES organs ("organ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "organ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organ undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Name or ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_organ_id FOREIGN KEY ("organ_id") REFERENCES organs ("organ_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, curator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "organ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organ record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the organ record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the organ record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_organ_id FOREIGN KEY ("organ_id") REFERENCES organs ("organ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public view */,
  "organ_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organ record viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the organ record was viewed */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who viewed the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_views_organ_id FOREIGN KEY ("organ_id") REFERENCES organs ("organ_id")
)
